/usr/bin/ar qc libAssetsTools_Static.a CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/AssetBundleFileFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/AssetBundleFileTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/AssetsFileFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/AssetsFileReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/AssetsFileTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/AssetsReplacer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/AssetTypeClass.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/BundleReplacer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/ClassDatabaseFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/EngineVersion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AssetsTools_Static.dir/ResourceManagerFile.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libAssetsTools_Static.a
